title: I find it baffling that you cant have hours column as a choice on a form, even after 3 years of waiting
excerpt:
it seems crazy that hours or time are not supported in a Form, this seems very basic?? 
start time and finish time for example.

posts.author: hobbit (wayne giles)
posts.cookedHtml:
it seems crazy that hours or time are not supported in a Form, this seems very basic??

start time and finish time for example.

posts.author: LaShaye (LaShaye Floyd)
posts.cookedHtml: I recently joined Monday.com and was shocked that this was not an option when I was building my form. I would look forward to this update as well. Rather than rely on people inputting times correctly in a text field, I would rather already have a field with these predefined settings for time (AM/PM, 12 hour format, etc) so that all entries are consistent. Thanks!
